anchor_payout_receipts_scales.name: anchor_payout_receipts_scales
anchor_payout_receipts_scales.value: "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."source_scale" between 0 and 18 and "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_gross_scale" between 0 and 18 and "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."fee_scale" between 0 and 18 and "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_net_scale" between 0 and 18

anchor_payout_receipts_target_units.name: anchor_payout_receipts_target_units
anchor_payout_receipts_target_units.value: "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_gross_currency" = "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."fee_currency" and "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_gross_currency" = "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_net_currency" and "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_gross_scale" = "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."fee_scale" and "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_gross_scale" = "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_net_scale" and "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_gross_issuer" is not distinct from "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."fee_issuer" and "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_gross_issuer" is not distinct from "jejak"."anchor_payout_receipts"."target_net_issuer"
